query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS board_members (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255),
  role ENUM('chair', 'vice_chair', 'secretary', 'treasurer', 'member') NOT NULL,
  committee JSON,
  term_start DATE,
  term_end DATE,
  status ENUM('active', 'emeritus', 'resigned') DEFAULT 'active',
  voting_rights BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  INDEX idx_role (role),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS board_meetings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('regular', 'special', 'annual', 'emergency') NOT NULL,
  date DATETIME,
  location VARCHAR(255),
  is_virtual BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  agenda JSON,
  attendees JSON,
  quorum_met BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  status ENUM('scheduled', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'scheduled',
  minutes TEXT,
  INDEX idx_type (type),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS board_votes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  meeting_id INT NOT NULL,
  motion TEXT NOT NULL,
  yes_votes INT DEFAULT 0,
  no_votes INT DEFAULT 0,
  abstentions INT DEFAULT 0,
  passed BOOLEAN,
  recorded_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_meeting (meeting_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS board_resolutions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category ENUM('financial', 'operational', 'strategic', 'governance', 'personnel') NOT NULL,
  proposed_by INT,
  proposed_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  status ENUM('proposed', 'approved', 'rejected', 'tabled', 'implemented') DEFAULT 'proposed',
  effective_date DATE,
  expiry_date DATE,
  INDEX idx_category (category),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS policies (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('hr', 'finance', 'operations', 'compliance', 'governance', 'it', 'safety') NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  content LONGTEXT,
  version VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '1.0',
  effective_date DATE,
  review_date DATE,
  status ENUM('draft', 'under_review', 'approved', 'superseded', 'archived') DEFAULT 'draft',
  approved_by INT,
  approved_at DATETIME,
  INDEX idx_category (category),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS strategic_goals (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category ENUM('growth', 'financial', 'operational', 'innovation', 'social_impact') NOT NULL,
  timeframe ENUM('short_term', 'medium_term', 'long_term') NOT NULL,
  target_date DATE,
  metrics JSON,
  status ENUM('not_started', 'in_progress', 'achieved', 'at_risk', 'missed') DEFAULT 'not_started',
  owner INT,
  priority ENUM('low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical') DEFAULT 'medium',
  INDEX idx_category (category),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS strategic_initiatives (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  goal_id INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  start_date DATE,
  end_date DATE,
  budget DECIMAL(15,2),
  status ENUM('planned', 'active', 'completed', 'on_hold', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'planned',
  progress INT DEFAULT 0,
  owner INT,
  INDEX idx_goal (goal_id),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);
